Uses of Class
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible.OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider

Packages that use OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.huggingface
Provides the provider implementation for the Hugging Face Inference API.
uno.anahata.asi.modal
Provides a pre-configured provider for Modal's GLM-5 inference endpoint.
uno.anahata.asi.openai.compatible
Provides a universal, OpenAI-compatible provider implementation for the Anahata ASI framework.

  • Uses of OpenAiChatCompletionsProvider in uno.anahata.asi.huggingface

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    HuggingFaceProvider
    A specialized provider for the Hugging Face Inference API that performs deep model inspection by fetching metadata directly from the HF Hub.
